title: astrodaucus littoralis
intro: Astrodaucus littoralis, also known as Beach Carrot or Sea Carrot, is a plant species native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its yellow flowers and edible roots. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astrodaucus littoralis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
